title: POI catalog data pipeline (geocode, normalize, dedup, validate)

tasks.title: Scaffold standalone POI pipeline dir + CLI entrypoint skeleton
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/scripts/poi-pipeline/ (OUTSIDE @repo/seed's src/ so the seed runtime can never import it, NG-1/NG-4). Add run.ts as a tsx CLI entrypoint parsing flags (--dry-run, --limit=N, --input=<csv path> defaulting to /home/qazuor/Downloads/POIS/Hospeda-POIs-Consolidado.csv). No pipeline logic yet, just arg parsing + a staged output dir constant (packages/seed/scripts/poi-pipeline/output/). Tests: arg parser unit test (defaults, --dry-run flag, --limit coercion).

tasks.title: Define shared pipeline types + fixed constants
tasks.description: Add types.ts + constants.ts: RawCsvRow type (all 20 CSV columns), GeocodeResult, ConfidenceTier ('high'|'medium'|'low'|'unresolved'), DESTINATION_SLUG_FIXUPS ({'pueblo-liebig':'liebig','villa-paranacito':'paranacito'}), REGIONAL_QUALIFIER (', Entre Rios, Argentina'), AUTO_GEOCODE_MARKER template string. Tests: constants smoke test (fixup table shape, marker contains 'auto-geocoded').

tasks.title: CSV loader (stage 1: Load)
tasks.description: Parse the CSV into typed RawCsvRow[] handling: UTF-8 BOM on the header, quoted fields containing commas (address/notes/source), semicolon-separated multi-values (categorySlugs/keywords/nearbyDestinationSlugs). The CSV is verified single-line-per-row (no embedded newlines) and has no escaped quotes, so a hand-rolled quote-aware line splitter is sufficient — NO CSV dependency. The loader validates the header against CSV_COLUMNS and, at RUNTIME against the real input, fails loud if the row count is unexpected. The source CSV stays external (~/Downloads); it is NOT committed to the repo (it is one-time migration input, not test data). Tests: INLINE fixture strings only (quoted-comma field integrity, semicolon splitting, BOM stripping, header validation) — no committed copy of the real file, no CI dependency on ~/Downloads.

subtasks.title: CSV parse with BOM + quoted-field handling

tasks.title: Destination reconciliation (stage 2, fail-loud) — G-4
tasks.description: Map each row's destinationSlug through DESTINATION_SLUG_FIXUPS, then validate the reconciled slug against the real seeded destination set (the 22 fixtures in packages/seed/src/data/destination/001-022). Any slug not in the fixup table AND not a real fixture slug ABORTS the run with a clear error listing offending rows (never silently drop, R-5). Tests: pueblo-liebig->liebig, villa-paranacito->paranacito, 20 direct matches pass, an injected unknown slug aborts.

subtasks.title: Load real destination fixture slug set
Tests: 2 fixups, direct matches, abort on unknown

tasks.title: Slug computation + dedup (stage 3) — G-3, OQ-1 underscore
tasks.description: For each row take the POI-slug segment (right of '__' in id), convert to snake_case with underscores (OQ-1: underscore, matching the 12 shipped fixtures). Detect cross-destination collisions across all 914; colliding bare slugs become <reconciledDestinationSlug>_<poiSlug> (using the reconciled slug from T-004, so pueblo-liebig prefixes with liebig). Non-colliding 868 stay bare. Assert ZERO duplicate slugs in the output set. Tests: municipalidad (16 dests) all get prefixed + unique, terminal-omnibus (13) likewise, a non-collider stays bare, global zero-dup assertion.

tasks.title: Geocoder abstraction + Nominatim provider (stage 5a) — OQ-3
tasks.description: resolveCoordinates(address): Promise<GeocodeResult | null>, provider-agnostic interface with a Nominatim (OSM) implementation (OQ-3 chosen). Fixed >=1000ms delay between requests (Nominatim usage policy), retry-with-backoff on 429/5xx, a hard total-run-time cap so a stalled network can't hang. Attach a proper User-Agent per Nominatim ToS. Tests: mock HTTP client, assert >=1000ms spacing between calls, backoff on 429, run-time cap trips, null on no-match.

subtasks.title: Nominatim impl + User-Agent + rate limit + backoff + run cap

tasks.title: Confidence tiering (stage 5b) — G-1 / §6.3.1
tasks.description: Map a Nominatim result's own match-quality signals (importance/type/class) to high/medium/low/unresolved. Only high/medium are written to lat/long; low is treated as unresolved (left null, listed in report) — a wrong coordinate is worse than a missing one. Tests: tier boundary cases, low->unresolved, a high-importance landmark -> high.

tasks.title: Geocode cache (stage 5c) — G-6 idempotency
tasks.description: Flat JSON cache file ({ [addressKey]: GeocodeResult }, addressKey = exact string sent to the geocoder incl. REGIONAL_QUALIFIER), stored in the pipeline's working dir (NOT @repo/seed runtime path) and committed to the repo. Read-before-network, write-after-resolve. A warm cache re-run makes ZERO network calls. Tests: cache hit returns without hitting the mock client, cache miss writes the entry, warm re-run = 0 network calls (AC-7 basis).

subtasks.title: JSON cache read/write keyed by exact address
Wire cache in front of resolveCoordinates

tasks.title: Category normalization + CATEGORY_SLUG_MAP (stage 4) — G-2, OQ-2
tasks.description: HOS-139 MERGED into this branch: the 40 seeded poi_category slugs ARE the CSV's 40 UPPER_SNAKE categorySlugs lowercased (historic_site, recreation, ...), so normalization is `value.trim().toLowerCase()` — NOT an arbitrary hand-map. Split categorySlugs on ';', trim, order-preserved; lowercase each; first entry -> isPrimary:true (OQ-2). Validate every normalized slug is a member of the real poiCategory fixture set (load packages/seed/src/data/poiCategory/*.json); a source value that does not resolve to a real slug ABORTS. Tests: 40/40 coverage vs real fixtures, order preservation, multiplicity kept, unmapped/unknown source aborts.

subtasks.title: Tests: 40/40 coverage + order + abort on unmapped

tasks.title: Re-freeze output contract vs MERGED HOS-138 schema
tasks.description: The spec §7 example lists fields (address, keywords, hasOwnPage, verified, verifiedAt, source, notes, categories) that the actual shipped fixture 001-*.json does NOT carry — verify the real merged points_of_interest v2 column set (packages/db schema + point-of-interest.schema.ts) and the real fixture shape, then document the TRUE target output shape for T-012. No emit yet, just the corrected contract doc in poi-pipeline/OUTPUT-CONTRACT.md. Tests: n/a (documentation task).

subtasks.title: Inspect real points_of_interest v2 columns + schema

tasks.description: REUSE HOS-139's deriveTypeFromCategorySlug(slug) from @repo/schemas (poi-category-type-mapping.ts) — it is exactly this table (9 direct mappings, catch-all -> OTHER, total function, never throws). Do NOT rebuild it. The pipeline imports it and derives type = deriveTypeFromCategorySlug(primaryCategorySlug). Tests: a mapped primary (e.g. beach->BEACH) and an unmapped primary (e.g. winery->OTHER) via the imported function.

tasks.title: Final per-POI JSON emit (stages 6-8) — G-5, G-7
tasks.description: Assemble one JSON file per POI in the re-frozen fixture shape (T-010): slug (T-005), lat/long (geocode or null, OQ-4), type (T-011), categories:[{slug,isPrimary}] (T-009), nameI18n.es from CSV name (en/pt null, no invented translations), descriptionI18n likewise, displayWeight from priority (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW->100/50/10), isFeatured from priority (HIGH->true), address/keywords passthrough. Provenance (G-5): verified/verifiedAt/source/notes carried UNMODIFIED for already-verified rows; geocoded rows force verified:false + append AUTO_GEOCODE_MARKER to notes. Write to staged output/ (not live seed folder, §6.4). Tests AC-5 (verified:true implies input verified), AC-6 (marker present on geocoded, byte-identical provenance on verified rows).

tasks.title: destination-relations.json emit (PRIMARY + NEARBY)
tasks.description: Emit destination-relations.json: PRIMARY row for every POI (all 914 relation=PRIMARY in raw data), plus NEARBY rows derived from nearbyDestinationSlugs (331 rows carry it), each resolved through the SAME destination reconciliation as T-004. Tests: PRIMARY count === 914, NEARBY rows only for the 331, every destinationSlug in output is a reconciled/real slug.

tasks.title: Verify normalized category slugs vs HOS-139 seeded slugs — AC-3
tasks.description: HOS-139 now merged into this branch: cross-check that every normalized category slug the pipeline can emit is a member of the real seeded poi_category slug set (packages/seed/src/data/poiCategory/*.json, 40 slugs); a test asserts membership (AC-3). No longer externally blocked. Note: caveat that #2295 is still open upstream — if its slug set changes before staging merge, re-verify.

subtasks.title: AC-3 membership test (map RHS subset of catalog)

tasks.title: End-to-end pipeline + idempotency tests (inline fixture) — AC-2/AC-7
tasks.description: Full-machinery test wiring load->reconcile->dedup->normalize->emit against a SMALL INLINE fixture (a handful of synthetic rows exercising quoting, a fixup, a slug collision, a multi-category row), with a mocked geocoder: AC-2 zero duplicate slugs across output, AC-7 byte-identical output on a second run with a warm cache and zero geocoder calls. These prove the machinery in CI without the real CSV. The real-number ACs (AC-1 exactly 914 files, AC-4 >=90% geocoded, AC-8 report totals consistency) are enforced at RUNTIME by the pipeline (fail-loud) and validated operationally from the T-018 run's report.json — NOT committed CI tests over the real file.

tasks.title: Report generation (report.md + report.json) — G-6
tasks.description: Emit report.md (human) + report.json (machine): total rows in/out, geocode stats (resolvedHigh, resolvedMedium, rejectedLowConfidence, unresolved with unresolved slugs listed), category-map coverage (40/40 expected), slug-collision count resolved (46 expected), destination mismatches resolved (2 expected), and any hard-fail. Tests: report totals satisfy AC-8 (resolvedHigh+resolvedMedium+rejectedLowConfidence+unresolved===717).

tasks.title: Nominatim dry-run (~20 rows) to validate match-rate — §12
tasks.description: Run the geocoder against a ~20-row sample (real network, rate-limited) BEFORE committing to the full 717-row run, to validate Nominatim's match-rate for this address set. If the high/medium rate is too low, document it and escalate the Mapbox fallback (OQ-3) to the owner. Document the outcome in poi-pipeline/DRY-RUN.md. Tests: n/a (operational validation), but the sample selection helper is unit-tested.

tasks.title: Full 717-row geocode run + OQ-2 spot-check + handoff to HOS-142 — AC-4
tasks.description: Execute the full 717-row geocode run (warms the committed cache), verify AC-4 (>=90% resolve high/medium; unresolved listed by slug, never zeroed/centroid-defaulted). Manual OQ-2 spot-check of ~30 rows across destinationTiers to confirm first-listed primary-category is sound. Hand the staged output/ directory + report to HOS-142. Tests: AC-4 threshold assertion over the real run's report.json.

subtasks.title: Full 717-row run + cache warm + commit cache
